name: release_gate
description: Run the final release gate - collect reviewer, tester, and CI reports, verify Definition of Done, classify risks, decide GO or NO-GO, and define a closure plan.
default_prompt: Use $release_gate when the task matches the "Release Gate" skill.
triggers: Run the final release gate - collect reviewer, tester, and CI reports, verify Definition of Done, classify risks, decide GO or NO-GO, and define a closure plan
